name: Pinnacle Investment Management Group Limited
analysis: PNI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$16.7400, stop A$14.6124, target A$18.4630 (0.81:1) — then trail it.
